text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eishin Flash is garnering attention from the
audience, but only by default because of the
other racers in the current roster.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, this fact doesn't seem to bother Eishin
Flash, as she's already looking ahead to the
Satsuki Sho.
